thoughtText: If your resolver works but your UI doesn't update, you're not done yet.
The fastest way to debug GraphQL is to read the schema first.
Full-stack developers don’t memorize everything — they understand how the layers connect.
If your mutation returns stale data, your database probably isn’t the problem — your options are.
Ship small. Ship often. Optimize later.
Your frontend isn’t broken. It’s just waiting for the right data shape.
GraphQL doesn’t reduce complexity. It moves it into the schema.
Clean commits are a love letter to your future self.
If you can explain the request flow from browser to database, you're hireable.
